title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Symboli
Rudolf...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Look there, Trainer. Do you see that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She points towards a claw machine. The prizes
seem to be plushies shaped like Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What a marvelous variety of designs. Rather
charming, wouldn't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They would look perfect in the student council
office... Hmmm, what to do...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf falls silent as she stares at the
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm rather unused to these amusement centers.
Truth be told, I've never played a claw machine
before.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Part of leading is choosing the right person for
the job. I would be a fool to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I eagerly await your success, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
